chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4524 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.20884/2023. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.01. 3. For orders on Misc. No.20885/2023. 4. For orders on Misc. No.20886/2023. 5. For hearing of main case. 21.09.2023. Petitioner is present in person. ------ YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner is apparently a practicing Advocate and professes to be the Legal Advisor of the Serena Residential Welfare Association. He has however come forward in a personal capacity so as to impugn the actions of certain private persons residing at the Serena Tower, who are said to have executed an agreement for the installation of advertising billboards on the roof of that building. The Petitioner alleges that the due amount of tax has not been deposited by those private Respondents in the public exchequer and seeks that directions be issued to them to provide the complete record of the previous five years; that the agreement for such advertising be cancelled, and that the matter be probed by the Anti-Corruption Department. Under the given circumstances, it is manifest that the Petitioner has no locus standi in the matter of the alleged dispute, which, even if taken at face value, is essentially a private matter between the Association of a residential building and certain residents, bereft of any element ostensibly attracting the jurisdiction of the Anti-Corruption Department. 2 That being so, the Petition is found to be misconceived, hence while granting the application for urgency we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications.

JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
